issue.title: Add CLI subcommand for issue generation from snapshot
issue.body: Users need a command to trigger issue generation. Existing CLI has subcommands for run, review, history, but not for issue generation.
acceptance_criteria: Command accepts optional snapshot path or uses latest
Command outputs summary of generated issues

- Planner: `llm`
- Agent runtime: `llm`
- Selected agent: `Phase 3 Codex 1782402810345`

- Runtime profile: `agent_4b050c358500:runtime`
- Agent reason: Direct assignment selected real AgentDefinition `Phase 3 Codex 1782402810345`.

## Selected Skills

## Agent Instructions
Phase 5 evidence: use attached skills and preserve environment key boundaries.

## Environment Keys
- `CODEX_HOME`
- `DEEPSEEK_API_KEY`

## Task
Users need a command to trigger issue generation. Existing CLI has subcommands for run, review, history, but not for issue generation.

## Planner Tasks
- Add CLI subcommand for issue generation from snapshot

## Allowed Paths
